Formulas.Description: ElectroMagnetic Amplifed by Stimulated Emission of Radiation Weapon
Formulas.Mass: PropertyValue('Power Input') / 1000 + PropertyValue('Chamber Volume') + PropertyValue('Radiator Volume')

Properties.Name: Range
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Maximum range at which the laser can fire. Long range is EARNED — its ceiling rises with the Beam Focusing Range tech.'

Properties.Name: ReloadRate
Properties.DescriptionFormula: '(Legacy) How much of a delay there is between laser pulses'

Properties.Name: Power Input
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How much power the laser consumes'

Properties.Name: Chamber Volume
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Volume of the chamber'

Properties.Name: Lens Diameter
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Diameter of a laser'

Properties.Name: Charge Period
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How much of a delay there is between laser pulses'

Properties.Name: Duty Cycle
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What percentage of the lasers charge period is spent firing '

Properties.Name: Target Wavelength
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What the wavelength of the output energy weapon is '

Properties.Name: Focal Length
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Optimal range: full damage at or inside this distance, degrading out to Max Range. Keep it BELOW Range (the engine clamps it to Range otherwise, collapsing the falloff band).'

Properties.Name: Emissitivity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How emissive radiators are (tech)'

Properties.Name: Radiator Volume
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Volume of the chamber'

Properties.Name: Radiator Thickness
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How thick radiators are (debug)'

Properties.Name: Radiator area
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How much area radiators have (debug)'

Properties.Name: Operating Temprature
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What temp the laser operates at'

Properties.Name: Input Light
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Energy out put of a laser pulse'

Properties.Name: Chamber Absorption
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What percentage of stored light in the chamber is lost as heat (tech)'

Properties.Name: Conversion Efficency
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What percentage of input energy gets converted into light (tech)'

Properties.Name: Lense Emission
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'What percentage of stored light is fired (tech)'

Properties.Name: Pulse Energy
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Energy output of a laser pulse'
Properties.PropertyFormula: PropertyValue('Lense Emission') * (PropertyValue('Input Light') - PropertyValue('Input Light') * Exp(PropertyValue('Chamber Absorption') * -1 * PropertyValue('Charge Period'))) / PropertyValue('Chamber Absorption')

Properties.Name: Thermal Output
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Waste Thermal heat output by laser'
Properties.PropertyFormula: (PropertyValue('Power Input') * PropertyValue('Charge Period') - PropertyValue('Pulse Energy')) / PropertyValue('Charge Period')

Properties.Name: Beam waist
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Width of beam at focal length (debug)'
Properties.PropertyFormula: PropertyValue('Operating Temprature') * PropertyValue('Operating Temprature') * PropertyValue('Focal Length') * 0.000000001 * PropertyValue('Target Wavelength') * ( 1 / PropertyValue('Lens Diameter') )

Properties.Name: genericWpnAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'int magSize, int reloadPerSec, int amountPerShot, int minShotsPerfire. MagSize=100 abstract units; one shot costs 100 units; reload rate fills one charge period worth per second.

Properties.Name: genericBeamWpnAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double maxRange, double wavelength, double pulseEnergy, double focalLength, double chargePeriod, double thermalOutput_W, double allowThermalOverride
Properties.PropertyFormula: AtbConstrArgs(PropertyValue('Range'), PropertyValue('Target Wavelength'), PropertyValue('Pulse Energy'), PropertyValue('Focal Length'), PropertyValue('Charge Period'), PropertyValue('Thermal Output'), 0)

Formulas.Description: A tube that houses missiles and launches them

Properties.Name: Max Calibre
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Maximum diameter of missile this can launch.'

Properties.Name: Max Length
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Maximum Length of missile this can launch'

Properties.Name: Max Mass
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Maximum Mass of missile this can launch'

Properties.Name: Auto Reloader Mass
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Increases the mass of the weapon, but increases the rate of fire.'

Properties.Name: Power Use
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'In MegaJules.'

Properties.Name: genericWpndbargs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'int magSize, int reloadPerSec, int amountPerShot, int minShotsPerfire, WpnTypes type

Formulas.Description: Electromagnetic mass driver: flings a solid slug at high but finite velocity. Brutal against slow targets, dodged by nimble ones.
Formulas.Mass: PropertyValue('Kinetic Energy Per Shot') / 1000 + PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second') * 50

Properties.Name: Muzzle Velocity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How fast the slug leaves the barrel. Fast, but FINITE — a nimble ship can dodge it (a beam cannot be dodged).'

Properties.Name: Kinetic Energy Per Shot
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Damage delivered by one slug on impact. Its ceiling rises with the Kinetic Yield tech.'

Properties.Name: Rounds Per Second
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Rate of fire. Drives both damage/sec and saturation (how much fire still lands on a dodger).'

Properties.Name: Tracking
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How well it follows an evasive target (0..1). A railgun is ballistic, so near zero.'

Properties.Name: railgunAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double muzzleVelocity, double kineticEnergyPerShot, double roundsPerSecond, double tracking'
Properties.PropertyFormula: AtbConstrArgs(PropertyValue('Muzzle Velocity'), PropertyValue('Kinetic Energy Per Shot'), PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second'), PropertyValue('Tracking'))

Formulas.Description: Rapid-fire pellet-cloud gun. Barely scratches a capital, but its volume of fire fills the sky — the fighter and missile killer.
Formulas.Mass: PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second') * 10 + PropertyValue('Pellets Per Shot') * 2

Properties.Name: Muzzle Velocity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How fast the pellets leave the barrel. Moderate — short-ranged, not a beam.'

Properties.Name: Damage Per Pellet
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Damage one pellet does. LOW — flak only tickles a capital; its strength is volume.'

Properties.Name: Rounds Per Second
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Bursts per second. With pellets/shot, sets saturation = how much fire fills the sky.'

Properties.Name: Pellets Per Shot
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Spread — pellets thrown per burst. Saturation = rounds/sec × pellets/shot.'

Properties.Name: Tracking
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How well the cloud follows an evasive target (0..1). Medium — the spread helps.'

Properties.Name: flakAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double muzzleVelocity, double damagePerPellet, double roundsPerSecond, double pelletsPerShot, double tracking'
Properties.PropertyFormula: AtbConstrArgs(PropertyValue('Muzzle Velocity'), PropertyValue('Damage Per Pellet'), PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second'), PropertyValue('Pellets Per Shot'), PropertyValue('Tracking'))

Formulas.Description: A projected energy SHIELD — a regenerating pool of joules it soaks before the hull is touched. Best against kinetic fire; energy weapons half-bleed through it and exotic anti-shield weapons ignore it. Drops when depleted, recharges between salvos. The defence twin of the beam.

Properties.Name: Shield Capacity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'The size of the shield pool — joules of fire it soaks before the hull is touched. Depletes as it absorbs, recharges between salvos.'

Properties.Name: Recharge Rate
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How fast the pool refills between salvos — the shields-recovering rate.'

Properties.Name: deflectorAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double capacity_J, double regenRate_Jps'

Formulas.Description: An ammunition magazine — the store railguns, flak, and missile launchers draw from. As the ship's ammo weapons fire it drains; when it runs dry those weapons go silent and the ship fights on with any energy weapons until it is resupplied. A bigger magazine sustains fire longer but weighs more.

Properties.Name: Ammo Capacity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Kilograms of ammunition the magazine holds. Drains as the ship''s ammo weapons (railgun, flak, missiles) fire; when empty those weapons go silent until resupply.'

Properties.Name: shipMagazineAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double capacity_kg'

Formulas.Description: An anti-shield ion lance. Light-speed (can't be dodged) and its EXOTIC nature bypasses shields to strike the hull — the answer to a shielded warship. Modest raw yield, so it isn't just a better beam; its whole value is the shield matchup.
Formulas.Mass: PropertyValue('Energy Per Shot') / 2000 + PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second') * 40

Properties.Name: Energy Per Shot
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Damage delivered by one ion lance on impact. Bypasses shields (exotic), so this lands on the hull directly.'

Properties.Name: Rounds Per Second
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Rate of fire. Drives damage/sec.'

Properties.Name: disruptorAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double energyPerShot, double roundsPerSecond'
Properties.PropertyFormula: AtbConstrArgs(PropertyValue('Energy Per Shot'), PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second'))

Formulas.Description: A rapid-fire plasma bolt-thrower. Its bolts are ENERGY in nature (a shield only half-soaks them — they bleed through like a beam) but travel at a FINITE velocity (a nimble ship can dodge them, unlike a beam) — the dodgeable energy weapon the weapon triangle had no cell for until Nature and Delivery split.
Formulas.Mass: PropertyValue('Energy Per Shot') / 2000 + PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second') * 30

Properties.Name: Energy Per Shot
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Damage delivered by one plasma bolt. Energy nature — a shield only half-soaks it.'

Properties.Name: Rounds Per Second
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'Rate of fire. Drives damage/sec and saturation (how much still lands on a dodger).'

Properties.Name: Bolt Velocity
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How fast a bolt travels. FINITE — a nimble ship can dodge it (a beam cannot be dodged).'

Properties.Name: Tracking
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'How well it follows an evasive target (0..1). A dumb bolt is low.'

Properties.Name: plasmaAtbArgs
Properties.DescriptionFormula: 'double energyPerShot, double roundsPerSecond, double muzzleVelocity, double tracking'
Properties.PropertyFormula: AtbConstrArgs(PropertyValue('Energy Per Shot'), PropertyValue('Rounds Per Second'), PropertyValue('Bolt Velocity'), PropertyValue('Tracking'))
